daily_summary.headline: Routine Launches and Low Aurora Activity

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 10-41
top_events.description: A batch of 29 satellites for the Starlink mega-constellation - SpaceX's project for space-based Internet communication system.

top_events.title: Firefly Alpha | Stairway to Seven
top_events.description: Firefly Alpha's Flight 7 will be a test flight and return-To-Flight for the launch vehicle after its April 2025 launch failure. It will test and validate key systems ahead of Firefly’s Block II configuration upgrade on Flight 8.

top_events.title: KAIROS | Flight 3
top_events.description: Third flight of the KAIROS launch vehicle, carrying 5 satellites.
